symptoms.leaves: Central leaf whorl dries up (dead heart) in vegetative stage
symptoms.stem: Bore holes at base of stem, frass (sawdust-like excrement) visible, hollow stem when cut
symptoms.fruit: White empty panicles (white ear) that can be pulled out easily
symptoms.pest_visible: Yellow-brown larvae 2-3cm inside stem, adult moths with brown wings

stem_borer.favorable_conditions: Continuous rice cropping, stubble left in field, high nitrogen

treatment.cultural: remove stubble after harvest, light traps for moths, avoid excess nitrogen

symptoms.leaves: Leaves folded longitudinally with silk threads, scraping damage inside fold, white streaks on leaves
symptoms.pest_visible: Green translucent larvae inside folded leaves, small brown moths

leaf_folder.favorable_conditions: High nitrogen, dense planting, shaded humid conditions

treatment.cultural: avoid excess nitrogen, maintain field hygiene

symptoms.leaves: Curling and yellowing of young leaves, sticky honeydew on leaf surface, black sooty mold growth
symptoms.stem: Clusters of small soft-bodied insects on tender shoots and growing tips
symptoms.fruit: Reduced seed/grain size, shriveled pods in mustard
symptoms.pest_visible: Small 1-3mm green/black/yellow soft-bodied insects in dense colonies, winged and wingless forms

aphid.favorable_conditions: Cool dry weather 15-25°C, lush green growth, absence of natural predators

treatment.cultural: conserve natural enemies (ladybirds, lacewings), yellow sticky traps, neem oil spray

symptoms.leaves: Irregular chewing damage on leaf margins, leaves eaten from edges inward, skeletonized leaves
symptoms.stem: Larvae may cut young plants at base
symptoms.fruit: Ear heads partially eaten, grain damage
symptoms.pest_visible: Green-brown caterpillars 3-4cm with stripes, feed at night, hide in soil during day

armyworm.favorable_conditions: Warm humid weather after dry spell, dense crop, weedy fields

treatment.cultural: deep ploughing, weed management, bird perches

symptoms.leaves: Minor feeding damage on tender leaves and growing tips
symptoms.fruit: Circular bore holes in bolls, frass visible at entry point, damaged lint and seeds inside, premature boll opening
symptoms.pest_visible: Green to brown larvae 3-4cm with dark stripes, found inside bolls, adult moths grayish-brown

bollworm.favorable_conditions: Warm weather 25-35°C, continuous cotton cropping, late-planted crop

treatment.cultural: Bt cotton varieties, pheromone traps, early planting, destroy crop residue

symptoms.leaves: Yellowing, downward curling, sticky honeydew, black sooty mold, leaf drying in severe cases
symptoms.fruit: Irregular ripening in tomato, reduced boll weight in cotton
symptoms.pest_visible: Tiny 1-2mm white-winged insects on leaf underside, fly up in cloud when disturbed

whitefly.favorable_conditions: Hot dry weather 30-35°C, continuous cropping, absence of natural enemies

treatment.cultural: yellow sticky traps, neem oil, conserve natural enemies, avoid broad-spectrum insecticides

symptoms.leaves: Minor feeding on leaves and flowers
symptoms.fruit: Circular bore holes in fruits, larva feeds inside causing rotting, frass at entry point
symptoms.pest_visible: Green larvae with dark bands 2-3cm inside fruits, adult moth yellowish-brown with dark spots on wings

fruit_borer.favorable_conditions: Warm weather, fruiting stage, continuous tomato cropping

treatment.cultural: pheromone traps, collect and destroy damaged fruits, neem seed kernel extract

symptoms.leaves: Leaf mining — irregular translucent patches where larvae feed between leaf surfaces
symptoms.stem: Larvae may bore into stems near soil level
symptoms.roots: Tunnels inside tubers with frass, tuber surface shows small entry holes
symptoms.fruit: Extensive tunneling inside stored and field tubers
symptoms.pest_visible: Small grey-brown moths 1cm, pinkish-white larvae in tuber tunnels

tuber_moth.favorable_conditions: Warm dry weather, exposed tubers (poor earthing up), poor storage conditions

treatment.cultural: proper earthing up, harvest on time, cold storage, destroy infested tubers

symptoms.leaves: Wilting and drying of young seedlings, sucking damage on leaves
symptoms.stem: Bugs cluster on tender stems and growing points
symptoms.pest_visible: Shield-shaped bugs 6-8mm with orange-red and black markings, found in clusters on plants

painted_bug.favorable_conditions: Warm sunny weather, seedling stage most vulnerable, dry conditions

treatment.cultural: early sowing to escape peak population, clean cultivation, remove weed hosts
